headline: CrowdStrike Taps Schwarz Digits To Target European Sovereign Cloud Security Demand
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) has entered a long-term partnership with Schwarz Digits. The agreement brings the CrowdStrike Falcon platform to STACKIT, a GDPR-compliant sovereign cloud in Europe. The partnership targets European critical infrastructure, highly regulated industries, and public sector entities. CrowdStrike will provide AI-native cybersecurity, including native SIEM and secure enterprise browser solutions. CrowdStrike Holdings, traded as NasdaqGS:CRWD, is a...

headline: Why Wells Fargo Sees Promise in SentinelOne (S) but Stops Short of Going Bullish
summary: SentinelOne, Inc. (NYSE:S) is one of the cheap AI stocks to buy in 2026. On March 3, 2026, Wells Fargo initiated coverage of SentinelOne with an Equal Weight rating and a $13 price target, with The Fly identifying Richard Poland as the analyst.
